nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Hey {{playerName}}, just checking in. Season's going well. I've got a couple things to run by you.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Can it wait? I'm focused on the series this week.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Got an endorsement inquiry from a local car dealership. $50K for a few commercials. Not huge money, but good exposure.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I've been getting some calls from other teams about your availability. Nothing serious — just sniffing around. Thought you should know.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Sure, set it up. Every bit helps.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Pass. I don't want the distraction right now.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm happy here. Tell them I'm not available.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Keep those lines open. You never know what might develop.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: We need to talk about my client's situation. He's outperforming his contract by a mile. This needs to be addressed.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: He's been great this year. What are you proposing?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: He signed a contract. We'll talk when it's closer to expiring.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: A restructured deal. More money now, or a no-trade clause. Something to show good faith.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'll look into it. No promises, but I hear you.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Contracts are contracts. He'll get paid when the time comes.
